bead.title: Thread CallerIdentity through request pipeline — identity extraction only (FEAT-012)
bead.description: Scope: identity extraction and propagation only. RBAC policy enforcement is a separate future task. Changes: (1) axon-server/src/service.rs (gRPC): extract actor from request metadata header 'x-axon-actor'; construct CallerIdentity { actor, auth_mode }; pass to each handler method call. (2) axon-server/src/gateway.rs (HTTP): same extraction from HTTP header 'x-axon-actor'. (3) Handler method signatures in axon-api/src/handler.rs: add caller: &CallerIdentity parameter to create_entity, update_entity, patch_entity, delete_entity, commit_transaction, and collection management methods. Handler uses caller.actor as the 'actor' field on audit entries. (4) --no-auth flag: identity = CallerIdentity::anonymous(); all operations proceed. No permission checks in this task.
bead.acceptance: Tests MUST use the real HTTP server test pattern from axon-server/tests/api_contract.rs (start a real server, issue HTTP requests) — NOT unit tests of handler methods directly. Required test cases: POST entity with 'x-axon-actor: agent-1' header; read audit log for entity; audit entry has actor=agent-1; POST entity without header; audit entry has actor=anonymous; --no-auth mode: request without header still succeeds with actor=anonymous; no request is rejected based on identity; existing tests pass (add identity header where needed)
